title: MPRIS2 is a stub — no D-Bus object registered, update() is a no-op
evidence: MPRIS2::update(const PlayerState &state) { m_impl->last_state = state; } — just stores state, prints nothing, no D-Bus signals.
suggestion: Either implement org.mpris.MediaPlayer2 on the session bus (with PropertiesChanged for track metadata, play/pause/next/prev/seek methods), or remove the class entirely if MPRIS2 is not needed yet. Currently it wastes a constructor call and an update() call per state change.

notes.text: Removed MPRIS2 class entirely (YAGNI — was a stub with no D-Bus registration)
